# SpatialAudioPlayer3D.EnableAirAbsorption property

When enabled, a distance-based lowpass filter simulates how air absorbs high-frequency sound energy over distance. This is independent of wall occlution and stacks with it.

```csharp
public bool EnableAirAbsorption { get; set; }
```
